name: BobasQuest
short_description: Welcome to the exciting world of Bobas Quest, a fun pixel art platformer where you have to make nimble jumps and complete levels using teleportation.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the exciting world of Bobas Quest, a fun pixel art platformer where you have to make nimble jumps and complete levels using teleportation.


Bobas Quest is a retro pixel-style platformer where you control a blue cube and complete 15 challenging levels. To achieve the goal, you need to use the teleport and visit each part of the level, activating special levers that disable obstacles and traps.

Game Features:
  • 15 levels with increasing difficulty
  • old school gameplay
  • pixel art graphics
